pi_items.source: Magento 2 ListMode source model and system.xml configuration. The value 'grid' represents 'Grid Only' mode where products are displayed exclusively in grid format.

Adobe Commerce configuration reference (experienceleague.adobe.com). Default allowed values in Magento 2 are '9,15,30', but the task specifies custom values '12,24,48' which is a valid configuration that can be set in Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog > Storefront.
Magento 2 configuration. The value '24' is valid as it is one of the allowed values in the custom grid_per_page_values set ('12,24,48'). Database path is 'catalog/frontend/grid_per_page'.
Magento 2 documentation and configuration. The database stores sort options as 'price', 'position', and 'name'. The value 'price' corresponds to 'Price' in the UI.

Magento 2 SEO configuration (catalog/seo/category_canonical_tag). The value '1' represents enabled/Yes state. Database convention in Magento: 1 = Yes/Enabled, 0 = No/Disabled. Accessible via Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog > Search Engine Optimization.

Magento 2 SEO configuration (catalog/seo/product_canonical_tag). The value '1' represents enabled/Yes state. Database convention in Magento: 1 = Yes/Enabled, 0 = No/Disabled. Accessible via Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog > Search Engine Optimization.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Magento 2 catalog settings through the admin panel. All metadata values are correct and correspond to valid Magento 2 configuration paths. The 'grid' value represents Grid Only display mode. The grid_per_page_values are custom-configured to '12,24,48' (Magento default is 9,15,30), with default grid_per_page set to 24. The sort_by value 'price' enables price-based product sorting. Both canonical tag settings use value '1' to enable canonical link meta tags for categories and products. All configuration paths (catalog/frontend/list_mode, catalog/frontend/grid_per_page_values, catalog/frontend/grid_per_page, catalog/frontend/default_sort_by, catalog/seo/category_canonical_tag, catalog/seo/product_canonical_tag) are standard Magento 2 database paths stored in the core_config_data table.
